entry.title: Document Management service btp trial account
entry.content:
Hi Experts , 

  I wanted to explore the Document Management Service in BTP trial account. Basically I wanted to  integrate with CAPM for file handling. But I am unable to add any entitlements for the same since when I search for it is unavailable.

Please help me out.

Thank you

entry.title: How to generate a Hyperlink to another Story within a custom Widget in SAC?
entry.content:
Hey, 

I tried to create a HTML link to another story within a custom widget. Unfortunatly that doesn't work. 
If you create a hyperlink in a text field within a story you can link both external websites and stories. 

I took the corresponding <a>...</a> HTML elements form my browsers inspector and used them in a custom widget.

Of course, the external URLs work as expected, but the links to stories are not so easy to copy.

Does anyone know how to create a hyperlink to a story or story page in a custom widget? 

Alternatively, it would also work if i could create a hyperlink within the SAC using a script. 

Unfortunately, so far I've only been able to find the option to add a hyperlink using the "three-dot menu". 

Best regards

Felix

entry.title: Re: Partitioning based on Change Number Range
entry.content:
Hi,
Please try these two things:
1. Be aware that you also need to define the initial parameter. This can be e.g. queried from CDHDR table based on UDATE column by taking the minimum changenr from CDHDR from the date you want to extract your data from:

parameters:
- name: changenr
initial: '0000000001'

 

2. If you get less data then expected, try to increase your pagesize. In rare occasions the extraction might stop because there is a gap in the changenumbers based on you filter criteria. Hence the extraction stops due to not finding additional records based your defined pagesize. 

In your case I suppose changing the initial value might help. Maybe from range 0000000001 to 0000100000 there are no changes on your database due to archiving reasons.

Best regards
Daniel

entry.title: Re: Strategy group and availability check on make to Orde...
entry.content:
Hi,

For RM net requirement to consider the available unrestricted stock also, then the RM stock shouldn’t be managed as sales order stock. Therefor for the RM, in the material master MRP4 view, set the individual/coll indicator as 2.

For an example for FG you can use strategy group as 20, and for RM, no strategy group but set individual/coll indicator as 2.

entry.title: Re: EWM Pick Point for Full and Partial Pallet
entry.content: Hello thanks for sharing the information . i have tried the above steps for full pallet picking . but i am not able to pick the entire pallet. it is picking partial pallet and also from other bin . i need the full picking of 360 quatantity. which is avalible in my bin. but rather then picking full pallet it is picking individual quantity from other bins and creating 5 WT rather than 1 WT for 360

entry.title: Re: Connecting Apache Active MQ 5.15.13 with JMS Adapters

Hi All,

Good day everyone. Third party team upgraded to ActiveMq 5.17.7. Our SAP PO system is SP20. If we deploy ActiveMq 5.17.7 in SAP PO system, then we getting version error. I have attached the error screenshot. Could you please advise.

Kind Regards,

Chaitanya.

entry.title: how to configure eslint checks for ui5 while pushing the code into the git?
entry.content: I want to configure Eslint checks for UI5 project. Also as and when the code is pushed to git it has to perform the checks before merging into the protected branch.

Hi @sourav-das ,

Thank you

entry.title: How can I download XML of quality inspection lot report
entry.content:
I am working on inspection lot report and quality certificate inspection lot report base on customer.

I didn't find the any option to get the xml, and where can i give the code #&&DOWNLOAD_FORM_DATA_XML&&# code to download the XML.

It's very urgent to complete the report.

Thanks in advance.

 

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP BPA Decision - Rules editor is not launching
entry.content:
Hi all

I am facing an error in creating decisions in SAP Business Process Automation service, The rules editor does not open when I click on 'Add Rule' button.

There are some errors in the browser console which I have provided in the attached file and down below in this post.

Note: It was working before, suddenly started getting this error today and even the existing rules won't load.

I have added the input and output parameters and saved,

Now, I click on 'Add Rule' button and nothing happens

This is what I see in the browser logs, (I have attached the log file with the post)

Thanks in advance.

Deepak

entry.title: Re: Is PPM supported in S/4 PPDS
entry.content:
Hi Damin,

if you just upgrade your ECC to to an S4 system and you still use and SCM APO system 7.1X version then yes.

If you upgrade to S4 and use the ePPDS application then no.

br

entry.title: Turn off automatic batch determination
entry.content:
Hi All,

So we get order from our sales team.

and when i use order number on va02 and click on delivery. the outbound generates, and the items comes with predetermined batch. our customer need deferent batch for each order doesn't follow FIFO. So is there a way to turn it off . or delete all the batches from Outbound at once.

please comment if you don't understand the question.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: CBTA Edge issue
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to suggest you to check the following first:

1. Make sure to use the latest CBTA version which can be downloaded from SAP ONE Support Launchpad

2. If the security settings from your company are blocking the browsers from using unpacked extensions. Follow the resolution from KBA:3351451 - CBTA - Loading of unpacked extensions is disabled by the administrator.

3. Check if you have Edge ALREADY OPENED on your session when running the CBTA Execution/Recording. If yes, please close it.

If the issue still persists, you can raise an incident with issue details under the component SV-SMG-TWB-CBT.

entry.title: Re: CAP CDS Annotations for Sorting
entry.content: Have you found a way to fix this issue?

entry.title: Re: Question on Solution Manager 7.2 CCLM User CC_ALL_SID
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough and you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: CIF error : Location doesn't exist for external locat...
entry.content:
you should list check in the SCM system if that location is not there at all.

--> run /N/SAPAPO/LOC3

--> if the location not there then you need to transfer the same via the imodel first.

--> in case there is already and active model and the plant is not transferred then you need to force the transfer via CFM) or report RIMODINI. That can happen because some queues where delete and the imodel was still getting activated without saved the location data in SCM.

--> if the location is there please check the loctyp a plant can not a loctype 1001 or 1002. If you change that in ECC and not the SCM then the location is not found because the loctyp is a keyfield in the selection

entry.title: Re: Issue opening PDF attachment in ITSM
entry.content: From the information you originally shared we're unable to provide a helpful answer as more details are needed. As some time has passed and this question might not be relevant for you anymore, please feel free to submit a new question with more details if you would like someone to have a closer look at this further.

entry.title: Re: ASCS pse certificates expiration monitoring
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough and you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One V10 SQL API
entry.content:
Hi RuanDuPreez,

If you have installed Service Layer correctly, the link to access it will appear in the Services tab of System Landscape Directory (SLD).

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: When installing the 32 bit DI API installer, it is no...
entry.content:
Hi Pipalia1,

You can proceed as below:

Open Command Prompt (cmd) as Administrator and navigate to the DI API installation path in cmd such as: C:\Program Files <x86>\SAP\SAP Business One DI API\DI API 90.

Run the command: regsvr32 SAPbobsCOM90.dll

Once you will run the command, it will give you the message that it has been registered or added.

Hope it helps!

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: SLT Job Status
entry.content: https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw73ehp1/7.31.19/en-US/4b/308aa91dd90a93e10000000a421937/content.htm?no_cache=true

entry.title: Re: SAP Commerce Backoffice - Redirect to specific url or...
entry.content:
You can extend DefaultSessionCloseStrategy and override the following method

 

public void closeSessionInHttpSession(HttpSession session)

 

You can execute your custom code before or after calling the super method.

Actually, this strategy is where the timeout is defined for the session with the property backoffice.session.timeout via setTimeoutOnHttpSessionCreation and trySettingExtensionSpecificTimeout methods. 

In you custom code, you can get the extension name as follows and if it's equal to "backoffice" you can execute your logic

 

Tenant tenant = this.getCurrentTenant(httpSession);
String webApp = httpSession.getServletContext().getContextPath();
String extensionName = Utilities.getExtensionForWebroot(webApp, tenant.getTenantID());

 

Hope this helps,

entry.title: ODATA V4 RAP - How to retrieve messages in response
entry.content:
Spoiler
 

Dear Support.

We want to call an api created on RAP ( Odata V4).  We read information about our question here https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/fbe1cb5613cf4a40a841750bf813238e.html and here https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/fc4c71aa50014fd1b43721701471913d/b9a77576783a455cbff617c497f2ed59.html

Upon appending messages in failed messages, they are correctly displayed in the response payload. However, when we append information or success messages in the reported section, for example:

 

 

Messages are included in the response header, with a limitation of 20 records.

 

 

But not in response payload

Is there any chance to report messages in the response payload? How are then appended the messages?

Regards

entry.title: Crystal report has built in export options?
entry.content: I am used angular 16 as front end and backend is .Net web API . i want display the crystal report in angular and also needed built in export options.(i want to export as excel , word, pdf, etc... like Kendo UI). is that possible? . if it is possible then what are the steps

entry.title: Re: Model concept in SAC considering connection with S4 HANA
entry.content: @christophtill Thank you Christoph I read the refernce that you provided me. Then trying to summarize pro/con of approach#1 and #2. About approach#2, I have a conecern about Pottential risk of data discrepancy of each models due to time rag of interfaces from S4. While interfacing huge data to each models in SAC, if some data changed in S4, I guess it might be the risk of data discrepancy of models. (ex. Start IF to Revenue model->Finish IF to Revenue model->Data changed in S4->Start IF to OPEX model) When I consider the point, is it better to take approach#1? Or any function to secure data consistency? Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Model concept in SAC considering connection with S4 HANA
entry.content:
@christophtill

Thank you Christoph

I read the reference that you provided me.
Then trying to summarize pro/con of approach#1 and #2.

 

About approach#2, I have a concern about Potential risk of data discrepancy of each models due to time rag of interfaces from S4.
While interfacing huge data to each models in SAC, if some data changed in S4, I guess it might be the risk of data discrepancy of models.
(ex. Start IF to Revenue model->Finish IF to Revenue model->Data changed in S4->Start IF to OPEX model)

 

When I consider the point, is it better to take approach#1?
Or any function to secure data consistency?

Best regards,

entry.title: Nächster Stammtisch mit ein oder zwei/drei 20minütigen Sessions?
entry.content:
Hi,

was hält ihr davon, wenn wir beim nächsten Stammtisch in Wien zwei/drei 15/20minütigen Sessions (Präsentation, Demo, ... ) machen? Jedes ABAP relevante Thema willkommen. Danach wie üblich Speis, Trank und Diskussion. Wünschenswert wären Themen, die zur Diskussion anregen könnten.

Dann würde ich versuchen eine Location zu organisieren wo wir das machen können. (Zur Not bei uns im Office - dann ins Gasthaus)

Grober Plan könnte sein:

18:00 - 19:00 Uhr 3x Sessions
19:00 - 19:30 Bier
19:30 - ...  Abendessen 

Eure Meinung?

lg Föß

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration Looping Process Call
entry.content: You are welcome @rasjoshi  CPI max gives this much as a limit. It shouldn't be a case with 9999 iterations anyway. There will be many problems in terms of performance anyway, it will be a very tiring and long process for CPI. So if it reaches the upper limit you won't be able to retrieve the remaining data.

entry.title: Re: DIMP _ Discrete Industries Mill Processing in S/4HANA
entry.content: Thanks Sir @arjuna_bandara

entry.title: Re: Queue error for CIF article master data transfer
entry.content:
here the same you see that you have some plant as loctype 1002 (DC) some are as 1001 (plant)

If you change the assignment in ECC /S4 but not in SCM then you can not find that location.
check /SAPAPO/LOCMAP table there you will find the BSG, LOGSYS, the LOCTYPE and the NAME.

In this example you see here that we have:

EXT_LOCNO is the plant name in ECC
LOGQS is the BSG (business system group) from /SAPAPO/C1
LOCNO is the location name in SCM APO (here after adjusting it in the inbound BADI adding PL+ZMS1+@Q32002 )
LOGSYS is Q63CLNT002 (source system logsys name)

EXT_LOCNO,LOCTYPE and LOGQS are the key fields that is use to read and if they do not match with the data that you use for transaction data or and other master data then you get the message location xyz not found , even if the EXT_LOCNO is there but some other keyfields are different.

entry.title: SAP BTP Hyperscalers
entry.content: Hi Experts, my customer uses the Cloud4C hyperscaler on their SAP S4HANA, for SAP BTP can use the Cloud4C hyperscaler too or can only use the currently available hyperscalers such as AWS, GCP, Alibaba Cloud & Microsoft Azure? can SAP S4HANA on Cloud4C connect with different BTP hyperscaler?

entry.title: Re: SAP PS - Assigning project types to the project profile not working
entry.content: Sorry for waking this old thread, but did SAP ever respond with something usefull.

entry.title: Re: Purpose of INCLUDE_MEMBERS_NOT_IN_HIERARCHY
entry.content:
Dear @praveen_kumar334,

the following note should explain the purpose of this statement:
3263115 - Data is not completely copied by Data Action script 

We're using this statement in our content to avoid data inconsistencies after performing data actions in case that master data is not properly maintained.

I hope this helps.

Best regards
Susanne

entry.title: Issue while deploying CAP project to SAP btp trail account
entry.content:
Created a project referring to Create a CAP Business Service with Node.js Using Visual Studio Code | SAP Tutorials , I'm facing below issue while deploying CAP project to SAP BTP trail account. 

Is there any changes required in package.json file.

 

{
  "name": "Books",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "A simple CAP project.",
  "repository": "<Add your repository here>",
  "license": "UNLICENSED",
  "private": true,
  "dependencies": {
    "@sap/cds": "^7.8.0",
    "@sap/cds-hana": "^2",
    "express": "^4"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@cap-js/sqlite": "^1",
    "@sap/cds-dk": "^7"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "start": "cds-serve"
  },
  "cds": {
    "build": {
      "tasks": [
        {
          "for": "hana",
          "dest": "../db"
        },
        {
          "for": "node-cf"
        }
      ]
    },
    "requires": {
      "db": {
        "auth": "dummy",
        "kind": "hana-cloud"
      }
    }
  }
}

entry.title: Outbound Communication for Freight Order Subcontracting (SAP_COM_0543)
entry.content:
Hello together,

i have configured the communcation arrangement for Freight Order Subcontracting (SAP_COM_0543).

 

When i choose the subcontracting --> send to carrier i get no error message.

 

But the message does not get anywhere. I have expected it to go to the Integration Suite Endpoint i have configured in the outbound communication to process the message further. Are there scope items missing maybe or what is the issue. 

best regards

FIlip

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 1 - S/4HANA OData
entry.content: Hi @Venkat_Vyza The link to the video is provided in webview1 control, and the visibility of this control is managed by the page variable showVideo.

entry.title: Re: How to Cancel test tenant creation service request an...
entry.content: You only need to raise a ticket to them saying that this action is to be canceled.

entry.title: Re: "Customer-specific data were not saved due to error M...
entry.content:
Hi Akash

The error message MDS_LOAD 047 is about missing synchronization. I think that your business partner has been created, but the synchronization to the customer or supplier (dependent on what you are creating) has failed. This means that you only have the BP tables filled and not the customer/supplier tables. 
Please check transaction MDS_PPO2. I think you will find your failed record here. 
From this transaction you can correct the data that are causing the error and hopefully you can save a complete BP record and get your data synchronized to the customer or supplier tables. 

Best Regards,
Gitte Greibe.

entry.title: Re: Navigation menu color
entry.content: Hi, these can all be controlled on the Theme tab under "Theme variables" > "Color variables" > "Navigation"

entry.title: Re: CIF Integration Model update APO MATLOC RRP_TYPE and...
entry.content:
use in the outbound exit and append structure or the free 

 badi CUSLNTRTO_ADDIN is the the PDS transfer you would like to change the product master data field or?

in exit EXIT_SAPLCMAT_001 Core Interface to APO: Enhancements to Material 

you have AT101-105 fields that are fields that you can use to but any data in

AT101 1 Types CHAR40 CHAR 40 0 Character field of length 40
AT102 1 Types CHAR30 CHAR 30 0 30 Characters
AT103 1 Types CHAR20 CHAR 20 0 Char 20
AT104 1 Types CHAR10 CHAR 10 0 Character Field Length = 10
AT105 1 Types CHAR10 CHAR 10 0 Character Field Length = 10

in SCM inbound you can then map this AT101 fields into the //MATLOC fields back if you like to fill that data our from S4/ECC

If you just needs to act on specifics fields send out from ECC then you can just add the logic into SCM inbound badi.

BADI nae is SMOD_APOCF005 method is EXIT_/SAPAPO/SAPLCIF_PROD_001

entry.title: Table control as input fields: 'LOOP' cannot be assigned to any field.
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

I have created a table control with wizard, so I could enable the input fields option. I have seen the method, how to extract data from it, however, right in the flow logic, I get the error: 'LOOP' cannot be assigned to any field.

in the PBO section (and also in the PAI section):

LOOP WITH CONTROL my_tc.

(module something.)

ENDLOOP.

I refered to the following problem: https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/table-control-how-to-accept-input-using-a-table-control/td-p/6230185

However, it fails right in the PBO section, with the error. I've also read that this error occurs when you haven't created the table control yet, but it's not the case here. 

If anyone's familiar with the issue, could you please help me out?

Thanks and regards, 

batyu

entry.title: Re: Is it possible we put a Water Mark on the data we exp...
entry.content: If your company Excel has sensitivity functionality like below, you can use that before sharing to other people outside your company.

entry.title: Practical introduction to SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine
entry.content:
Introduction

With the latest update to SAP HANA Cloud, SAP has announced the general availability of the HANA vector engine. Now, HANA DB joins the ranks of other databases that natively support storing, retrieving, and querying vectors.

In this blog post, I will delve into the significance of this development, briefly explore the capabilities of the vector engine, and provide a few examples on how to utilize this functionality. Don't worry, the code examples will be concise and straightforward.

 

Why is this important?

Large language models (LLMs) are emerging from academia and finding practical applications in the real world. While ChatGPT from OpenAI is the most well-known LLM, there are thousands of others, ranging from academic implementations to state-of-the-art models.

LLMs are algorithms that take text as input and generate text as output. They can answer questions, provide instructions, write code, or even compose emails. However, despite their impressive capabilities, LLMs are not omniscient. Querying them for any information may not always yield a sensible response. To overcome this limitation, we can provide the LLM with relevant information alongside the query, allowing it to refine its output based on the provided context. This technique is known as Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG). But how do we determine what information to feed the LLM? Our knowledge base may be significantly larger than the input size limit of the LLM's prompt.

This is where features like the HANA Vector Engine can come into play. By storing our knowledge base in HANA Vector Engine, we can retrieve text similar to the query using a similarity search function and then feed those retrievals into the LLM for further processing. In this blog post, we will focus on the storing, retrieving, and performing similarity searches in HANA Cloud DB, not how we convert text into embeddings or break down large documents, that's a topic for other blog posts ;).

 

HANA Vector Engine

To demonstrate the capabilities of the HANA Vector Engine, let's start by creating a table:

 

CREATE COLUMN TABLE "DEMO_TOKENS" (
"ID" INTEGER NOT NULL ,
"DESCRIPTION" NVARCHAR(256),
"TOKEN" REAL_VECTOR(300),
PRIMARY KEY ("ID")
)
UNLOAD PRIORITY 5 AUTO MERGE;

 

What's new in this release is the REAL_VECTOR(N) data type which is a data type storing an N-dimensional vector of single precision floating point numbers. 


Inserting into the vector table

Inserting into this table is just like any other insert in SQL. We can use the `TO_REAL_VECTOR` function to convert a text representation of the vector components into a `REAL_VECTOR` prior to insertion. In the example below we insert a record with description `company` and the vector representation of that word as an N-dimensional vector (with N equal to 300 in this case):

 

INSERT INTO "DEMO_TOKENS" VALUES(
1 /*ID <INTEGER>*/,
'company' /*DESCRIPTION <NVARCHAR(256)>*/,
TO_REAL_VECTOR('[0.005068,-0.023730,-0.062008,-0.053183, ... ,0.000101,-0.010792]')/*TOKEN <REAL_VECTOR>*/);

 

As an example I have done a few more inserts for more tokens/words in the table.

 

Searching

When it comes to searching for similar terms using the HANA Vector Engine, we can leverage the power of SQL queries and two essential functions: cosine_similarity and l2distance. These functions allow us to measure the similarity between vectors and retrieve results based on their proximity.

The cosine_similarity function calculates the cosine similarity between two vectors and returns a value between 0 and 1. It would return a 1 for an exact match.

On the other hand, the l2distance function calculates the Euclidean distance between two vectors and returns a value. In this case, a value of 0 represents an exact match, while higher values indicate increasing dissimilarity.

Don't worry too much about the above definitions, this is still trivial to use. Here's three examples:

 

-- search for "school" - Returns school at the top
SELECT top 1 *
	from DEMO_TOKENS
	order by cosine_similarity("TOKEN",
	TO_REAL_VECTOR('[0.037047,0.011441,0.014958, ... ,0.042594,-0.023278,-0.042991,-0.005077,0.036849,0.048736]')
) desc;

-- search for "university" - Returns school as most similar
SELECT top 1 *
	from DEMO_TOKENS
	order by cosine_similarity("TOKEN",
	TO_REAL_VECTOR('[-0.015841,0.003277,0.041488,... ,-0.071284,-0.017821,-0.031682,0.048277,0.022535]')
) desc;

SELECT *
	from DEMO_TOKENS
	order by l2distance("TOKEN",
	TO_REAL_VECTOR('[-0.015841,0.003277,0.041488, ... ,-0.031682,0.048277,0.022535]')
);

 

 

Conclusion

With the SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine generally available, there is now little need to explore alternative databases for this type of computation. SAP has provided us with a robust solution that can handle the necessary operations, making it a go-to choice for vector-related tasks in BTP.

One aspect that piques my curiosity is its performance characteristics. How well does it scale when faced with millions of tokens to search? This is something I'll aim to explore further.

Until then, thanks for reading and take care.

entry.title: Re: Does API gateway respects two db instances
entry.content:
Hi LukaszBloch,

Under the current design, Gateway Services need to work with SLD service "side-by-side", it means that the rule "1 SLD service instance, 1 gateway/authentication service instance" should be strictly followed.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: SAP Data services
entry.content:
Hi @Akshatha_P ,please check the PAM for Data Services on page 8

https://support.sap.com/content/dam/launchpad/en_us/pam/pam-essentials/TIP/PAM_DataServices_4_2.pdf

(5) This is a Red Hat Enterprise Linux or SuSE Minor version that Data Services certified. Redhat and SuSE state the installation of packages
between minor releases is supported. Hence Data Services will grant “compatible support” with other Red Hat/SuSE higher and lower minor
versions within the same major version based on Red Hat’s/SuSE’s eligibility statement of minor version compatibility.

RHEL 8.9 should thus have compatible support with DS 4.2 SP 14

That said, I would however also consider upgrading DS to the latest release. (4.3 SP03)

entry.title: Rounding decimals in RF transaction (pick by WO)
entry.content:
Hi,

I created a Warehouse Order that I need to pick. For that i'm using the RF transaction.
The HU I need to pick has 3 decimals, the warehouse order that I created also has 3 decimals in it corresponds to the quantity of the HU.

When I pick the HU with the RF transaction and I'm on the confirmation screen it shows the correct quantity and 3 decimals but when I confirm this an error message pops up that I need to pick the quantity rounded up to 1 decimal. 

So for example:
HU: 389,524 kg
WO also shows: 389,524kg
Confirmation screen says: 389,524kg
After confirming error says: Pick 389,5kg

Anyone has an idea where to look for this?

Thank you.

Regards.

TT

entry.title: Re: Error during SBO user authentication
entry.content:
Hi upextech,

Kindly help to share your DI API code.

Also, share the screenshot of the DB Instances window from the System Landscape Directory (SLD).

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Change the owner in lead issue
entry.content: Might be Employee Responsible in Leads Business Configuration is tagged as mandatory:

entry.title: Re: SAP APO Connectivity with SAP ECC and S/4 HANA parall...
entry.content:
you can have one SCM APO system connected to many OLTP system and that can be a ECC or an S4 system.

Connect one ECC system to multiple SCM APO system is not supported .

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ADVANCED_PLANNING_AND_OPTIMIZATION,_ON_SAP_ERP/c95f1f0dcd9549628efa8d7d653da63e/3928c9535f267414e10000000a174cb4.html

entry.title: Re: Marketplace Updates not working
entry.content: Hi, thanks for reporting this. There is a fix on the way to the login page reset issue. The update to the flow functions is about enhancing error messages for BTP Destinations, but seems that it does not work correctly for REST API integrations. You can keep working with the older version until we provide another fix. Apologies for the inconvenience!

entry.title: Re: SAP Commerce Backoffice - Redirect to specific url or...
entry.content: Sorry, I have already tried this but I need to clear cookies as stated in the question. This is not possible from the DefaultSessionCloseStrategy in any way I can tell.

entry.title: Re: How to add action in custom workcenter in SAP C4C
entry.content: We do have standard Actions for Lead conversion which can be enabled on Business Configuration of Lead Status:

entry.title: Re: Backend system for S4 hana public cloud 2402 for debu...
entry.content:
Hello Sad,

unfortunately there is no back-end access to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition possible. In the SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit there is a functionality to simulate the data before you migrate it. Errors such as missing customizing or missing master data will be shown in the simulation, so you can check the data and adapt if necessary before you migrate the data. In addition you should test the data migration in your SAP S/4HANA Cloud Test/Quality System before you migrate the data to your SAP S/4HANA Production System.

Best regards, Kirstin

entry.title: Re: Navigation not working in BUILD app when accessed via C4C Mashup
entry.content:
Hi Yogesh,

Generally, C4C Mahup will not control the behavior of the content. It just shows the content.

Kindly try accessing the page at http://iframe.projects.vincemitchell.me. If the same unexpected behavior exists, then raise a ticket to the SAP BUILD Apps teams. Otherwise, raise a ticket to the C4C Mashup team.

entry.title: Re: Unexpected response using the API Gateway ExportPDFData
entry.content:
Hi nnouhi,

ExportPDFData, LoadAuthorizedCRList or LoadCR are expected to work for API Gateway in SAP Business One.

API Gateway allows you to export Crystal Layout into PDF. API Gateway runs on port 60000 or 60020.

Refer to this link for the same: About SAP Business One API Gateway 

Hope it helps!

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: How to check runtime CR 13 with SP 25 installed from...
entry.content: You can also check the uninstall directory in the registry using the product ID.

entry.title: Re: where I can find Marketing Attributes of a BP on Customer engagement
entry.content: Dears, Let me also know if you found solution for this.

entry.title: Can we create complex transactional FIORI apps using RAP?
entry.content:
We have to migrate ESS' webdynpro applications to UI5 Fiori apps. But our webdynpro applications are very complex and bulky. We are receiving a lot of input data in non-tabular format and then processing through complex logic. There are numerous screen level validations as well. Upon processing, the data is written down in multiple standard as well as custom tables. 

Can we create such complex Fiori apps using SAP RAP Model or we should follow some other model for this task. One approach is to create multiple ODATA services without CDS view and Annotations and then process the data in individual function modules. CDS/BOPF/RAP are appropriate for tiny applications where not much front end coding is required.

For example, can we create travel expense application using SAP RAP model ?

entry.title: Re: SQL LTRIM version?
entry.content:
Hi Luis,

There are likely 2 issues with your select statement. The first is, that you're missing the @ in front of data(prueba). The second one is, that you need to add a leading and trailing whitespace around belnrp. ABAP is whitespace sensitive.

The select statement:

SELECT ltrim( matnr, '0' ) 
  FROM mara 
  INTO TABLE @DATA(materials).

will work, while the following statement will have your issues:

SELECT ltrim(matnr, '0') 
  FROM mara  
  INTO TABLE DATA(materials).

BR,
Alex

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content: 8f1e1c0c4566d1d31e7be97e2bae04ef5edad72263e55bc6fa818fcf702eb4bb

entry.title: Re: Provision users from Microsoft Azure AD to SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication
entry.content:
Hey @tskwin,

not sure what your requirements are. If you need to synch groups you require SAP IPS. The mechanism described on our docs before is about mapping based on attributes like groups but actually re-creating them on the SAP side.

In general, like with any integration project, less redundancy and a single source of truth is beneficial.

KR Martin

entry.title: Re: Can we receive EMAIL NOTIFICATION SAP Cloud ALM Data...
entry.content:
Which SAP Cloud ALM app is showing that message? Is it Health Monitoring?

Information about the data collection activities is a kind of "meta" metric. This means that it is not monitored from the system level, but the SAP Cloud ALM level. 

The SAP Cloud ALM Health Monitoring app "overview" page should have a tile specifically for the SAP Cloud ALM tenant itself. If you drill down into the tile, you'll find it has metric "Data Collection Status". Clicking on that metric will give you a display of all services/systems connected to SAP Cloud ALM and that should have some kind of Health Monitoring data collection associated with them. 

The event "Health Monitoring: Data collection failed" can be configured to send e-mails when the Health Monitoring data collection status fails for any service/system that is expected to have data collected for it. As far as I can tell, this only applies to Health Monitoring and none of the other Operations apps offer similar monitoring/e-mail events associated with Data Collection.

entry.title: Re: How do you retrieve an PM equipment using a linked FI...
entry.content: Thank you @Raymond_GIUSEPPI.

entry.title: Re: SAP mibs and Systems Insight Manager (SIM)
entry.content: Hi Pal,

entry.title: Re: How do you retrieve an PM equipment using a linked FI...
entry.content: ST05 is exactly what I was looking for...and you are correct, it identified a select from M_EQUIA.

entry.title: Re: How to Specify a Custom Schema Attribute in IdDS for...
entry.content:
UPDATE 2024-04-05: In the meantime, I have discovered that this functionality works for Self-Defined Attributes (Application Attributes), and the value is integrated into the SAML Token.

We consider this feature essential when using custom schema attributes.

entry.title: Re: SAP mibs and Systems Insight Manager (SIM)
entry.content: .I am doing Solman and Service now integartion, and using PO system as middleware. Solman is able to send SNMP to PO, but facing issue to figure how to receive TRAP in PO system. Request your help to understand How PO will be able to receive TRAP

entry.title: Re: Authorization in SAPUI5 apps using BOPF and CDS
entry.content:
Hi,
great Tutorial!
For some reason my implementation does not call the /BOBF/IF_LIB_AUTH_DRAFT_ACTIVE~CHECK_STATIC_AUTHORITY function altough it is given by the IF in the corresponding Authorisation Class. Do you, or anyone else, have an idea why the authorisation class will not call the function and the external breakpoint (like yours) wont be reached. Is there any setting as to specify if the superclass or redefinition function should be called for authorisation check ?

Thanks in advance, cheers.
Dominik

entry.title: Re: SAP CloudALM - Transports for SAP Business Suite
entry.content:
The SAP Help Portal documentation for SAP Cloud ALM page about Integration of Deployment Tools currently mentions 3 different supported tools:

  • Change and Transport System (CTS)
  • Cloud Transport Management service (CTMS)
  • Adaptation Transport Organizer (ATO)

It also lists what solutions are integrated for each tool. 

Most of the product types you listed in the SAP Business Suite (ERP, Fiori, BW, etc.) seem to fall under the category of general on-premise Netweaver based ABAP systems. The Change and Transport System (CTS) is integrated with SAP NetWeaver Application Server for ABAP on-premise systems. So SAP Cloud ALM can be used to manage on-premise ABAP changes.

entry.title: Re: SAP Commerce Backoffice - Redirect to specific url or...
entry.content: Sorry, I missed the part you wanted to remove cookies. I think you can achieve what you need with filters since you have access both the request and response. However I am not sure if you can understand if the session is timed out or user is logged out. You can try to see if it works in one of the filters (e.g. backofficeRedirectFilter) to see if you can understand session timeout via debugger. If that works, I can suggest a way to add your custom filter to backofficeFilterChain

BR,

Yogesh

entry.title: Re: Can we delete the UDT/UDO log tables, if we untick lo...
entry.content:
Hi Pipalia1,

Under the current design, the log table is not deleted automatically.

SAP Business One uses the Customer Influence site https://influence.sap.com/go/SAPBusinessOne for collecting, tracking, and prioritizing of requirements.

Please see and follow the recommendations in SAP Note 1028874, section B to post your requirement in SAP Business One Customer Influence site.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Ariba: GR not created from Ariba Guided buying
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In SAP system, I am not seeing GR number created when sent from Ariba. Kindly let me know what could be the issue or where can I see the error. There is no error message in transaction tracker.

Steps followed:

1.We are creating PR from Guided buying followed by a PO which created automatically.

2.Then we are doing Order confirmation, followed by GR creation in Ariba.

3.In SRT_MONI interface is showing as successful for GR creation. But no GR in EKBE table.

entry.title: Re: Does SAP C4C Mobile app support SAP Fiori SDK for lau...
entry.content:
Hi Vivek,

The mashup faces many limitations in offline mode. One is that the external Apps cannot be launched from C4C mashup running in offline mode.

For example, there is a button in C4C mashup. In online mode, clicking the button would launch the mobile app "SAP for Me" automatically. However, in offline mode, it will not work.

I am not sure if this is the business scenario you described. If it's not, would you mind to share more information?

entry.title: 入門！SAP Analytics Cloud for Planning 機能紹介シリーズ - モデルの設計
entry.content:
本ブログシリーズはSAP Analytics CloudのPlanning機能をこれから学ぶ方を対象とし、予算計画などの一連の予算管理業務に必要なSAP Analytics Cloudのそれぞれの機能の特徴や要点をご紹介します。

※機能の詳細ついてはSAP Help Portalをご参照ください。

※ SAP Analytics Cloudは、四半期に１度のペースで製品のバージョンアップが実施されます。そのため今後のバージョンアップにより、本ブログで紹介する画面キャプチャや、操作が異なる可能性があることをご了承ください。（本ブログは2024年4月に作成しています。）

目次：

  • SAP Analytics Cloudの主な構成
  • モデルとデータセット
  • 計画モデルの設計

SAP Analytics Cloudの主な構成

SAP Analytics Cloudでは下図のような構成でデータソースへのアクセスからデータ活用までが行われます。本ブログではSAP Analytics Cloudのストーリーやエクセルアドイン上で計画タスクを行えるようにするためのデータ準備フェーズにおける「計画モデル」についてご紹介します。

 

モデルとデータセット

SAP Analytics Cloudではメタデータを定義するものとして「モデル」と「データセット」の2種類をご用意しています。データセットでは、複雑な設定項目がないため、シンプルで業務ユーザでも容易に利用することが可能です。一方で、モデルでは分析軸となるディメンションと、分析軸に応じて集計される数値、メジャーを定義します。そして、モデルには参照専用の「分析モデル」と、書込み・更新が可能な「計画モデル」があります。


計画モデルの設計

計画モデル

計画モデルはモデル推奨設定で計画機能をオンにすることで作成できます。

計画モデルは、予測などの事業計画タスクを実行する際に役立つよう、事前設定されています。ストーリー内で計画モデルを使用すると、計画担当者がさまざまな機能を使用してモデルの値を更新したり、新しい値を作成したりすることができます。計画プロセスを効率的にサポートするために、計画プロセスを簡単に開始できるようにする既製の機能が数多く用意されています。

（例）

  •  予算、計画、予測などのバージョン管理
  • ユーザのデータに適合するように調整できるデフォルト期間
  • トレーサビリティのための監査機能
  • マニュアル入力

ディメンション

定義可能なディメンションタイプ

計画モデルでは以下の5つのディメンションタイプをご用意しています。

※1 ()内のディメンションは公開ディメンションの場合はデフォルトプロパティでありません。
　   []内のディメンションはモデルで通貨換算が設定されている場合のみデフォルトプロパティとなります。
※2 勘定モデルでは必須ディメンション

公開ディメンションと非公開ディメンション

ディメンションは公開または非公開にすることができます。公開ディメンションは複数のモデル間で共有でき、非公開ディメンションはあるモデル内のみに存在します。組織内の他のユーザ (国、製品、組織ユニットなど) がディメンションを再利用する可能性がある場合は、ディメンションを公開ディメンションとして定義することをお奨めします。

勘定ディメンションのデフォルトプロパティ
  • 式
    ディメンションタイプを勘定と定義すると、デフォルトプロパティとして式が作成されます。メンバ間で四則演算に加え、高度な式エディタを使って様々な要件での計算を定義できます。ただし、式で複雑な計算を行うとパフォーマンスに影響する場合がありますのでご注意ください。
  • 勘定タイプ
    勘定タイプには、収益 (INC)、費用 (EXP)、資産 (AST) 、負債/資本 (LEQ)、NFIN（非金融）の5種類があります。勘定タイプの設定に基づいて表示時やデータインポート時に符号のコントロールがされます。例えば、収益 (INC)勘定データは、モデル内のトランザクションデータはマイナスで保持し、画面上に表示するときは符号反転させてプラスで表示させます。

メジャー

定義可能なメジャーのデータ型
その他の設定
  • 集計
    メジャーではSum (合計) のみをデフォルトとして使用できますが、例外集計タイプとして（件数、平均など）を指定することができます。
  • 単位と通貨
    金銭メジャーの通貨、または非金銭メジャーに表示される単位を設定するには、これらのオプションを使用します。
    • 単位: 非金銭価額に固定単位を表示する場合は、このオプションを使用します。単位を固定単位で入力します。
    • なし: 単位を表示する必要がない場合は、このオプションを選択します。
    • 通貨: 金銭価額については必ずこのオプションを選択して、メジャーの通貨設定を指定します。たとえば、米ドルのみを表示するメジャーの場合は、"通貨" を "固定" に設定して、USD と入力します。
  • 書式設定
    数値の表示としてスケール（千・百万・十億・パーセンテージ）と小数点以下桁数（0-7）を定義することができます。


今回はモデル設計のご紹介でした。SAP Analytics Cloudは他にも予算計画などの一連の予算管理業務に必要な機能を備えており、本ブログシリーズではそれぞれの機能の特徴や要点をご紹介しています。
こちらのリンクからご参照ください。

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM mappings for Fresh Service
entry.content:
I'm afraid there's just not enough information here to help.

  1. What kind of mapping are you using (payload, or rule based)?
  2. What is the "eventType" that your status choices are contained in (e.g. "EVENT-SITUATION.CREATE")?
  3. Is the status choices block in a request, or a response block in your JSON?

Ideally you should upload a file containing a copy of your full JSON so we can review it for structural issues. If we can't see the entire JSON, we're just making guesses and it won't be very helpful.

entry.title: Re: Does API gateway respects two db instances
entry.content:
Hello.

Thank you for your response.

However, you will admit that SLD allows for the registration of more than one server. The service layer may not allow for simultaneous connection to two servers, but it does allow for switching between instances. Therefore, such a limitation on the API Gateway side is, in my opinion, incomprehensible.

It only utilizes a portion of the capabilities that the system offers. 😞

entry.title: Re: Table control as input fields: 'LOOP' cannot be assigned to any field.
entry.content:
Check your table controls definition

  • CONTROLS my_tc TYPE TABLEVIEW 
  • in the dynpro definition
  • check that the program is activated (every sub object as dynpro or include)

entry.title: Re: Does SAP C4C Mobile app support SAP Fiori SDK for lau...
entry.content:
Hi AlanChen,

         The following is a business scenario, where we are looking for a provision to launch Fiori application through mashup which supports offline capability. First (one) time load of Fiori UI5 SDK library and cache it into localstorage so library can be reused.

Best Regards,

Vivek V

entry.title: Re: Putaway Process - Put 1 or more HUs in a Final bin
entry.content:
Hi @JuergenPitz ,

Please find below details - 
1. Capacity exists in terms of Weight. I see when 2 HUs are moved to separate Bins both bin shows 25 % capacity utilizations.

2. At storage type level , I have set putaway rule = 2 ( add to existing stock or bin )

3. I am putting same material in both HUs and quantity is also same in both HUs

Thanks !!

Thanks for detailing this workaround solution!

Looking forward when this is replaced with standard functionality in the future.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori (APP Server)のvCPU数増強について
entry.content: ご回答ありがとうございます。今後は上記よりお問い合わするようにいたします。

entry.title: AI Foundation on SAP BTP: Q1 2024 Release Highlights
entry.content:
AI Foundation is SAP’s all-in-one AI toolkit, offering developers AI that’s ready-to-use, customizable, grounded in business data, and supported by leading generative AI foundation models. It is also the basis for AI capabilities that SAP embeds across its portfolio.

If you are not already familiar with the different capabilities of the AI Foundation stack represented below, read this introductory blog post.


Let's delve into the Q1 2024 release highlights of the AI Foundation, including innovations for the Document Information Extraction service, SAP Translation Hub, SAP AI Core and SAP HANA Cloud. 

AI Services 

Document Processing - Document Information Extraction

New: Combine Different Setup Types When Adding Data Fields to Schemas

Users can now combine header fields with different setup types in the same schema.
They can add header fields with the following setup types to a schema created for a standard document type (e.g. invoice) or custom document type:  

  • auto (with and without a default extractor) 
  • manual 

This extends the scope of the existing standard schemas from SAP, such as for the invoice document and reduce time to value for new business fields (key-value pairs) that need to be extracted from documents. 

New: Conversion of Country Specific Unit of Measure Values to ISO Format

The conversion of country specific unit of measure values into ISO format for invoice documents has been improved. For instance, the processing of certain locale-specific unit of measures (e.g. German 'Stk.' for 'Stück' / 'piece'). Users can expect improved quality of extraction and faster business process execution. 

New: Purchase order number extraction from line-item level 

Users can extract purchase order numbers that are available on-line item field level from invoice documents. It allows a faster execution of accounts payable processes when there are multiple PO numbers listed in the tables of supplier invoices.

New: New Invoice Supported Language – Japanese

The Document Information Extraction service supports now the Japanese language for invoice documents, improving global coverage.

New: Better Models for the Extraction of Standard Document Types

The machine learning models for the extraction of invoice, paymentAdvice, and purchaseOrder documents have been improved. Users can expect improvements in particular when extracting dates, amounts, tax ID, bank accounts. 

  • Invoices: higher extraction accuracy can be expected for Japan, Hungary, Türkiye, and Romania.  
  • Purchase orders: improved extraction accuracy can be expected for Spanish purchase orders.
  • Payment advice: more consistent column extraction and improved extraction of amounts in line-items.

Get started with Document Information Extraction.

Machine Translation - SAP Translation Hub

New: User settings for the document translation UI 

Users can define the preferred UI language and theme in the application, which will be carried over across software and document translation UIs, thus improving the overall user experience. They can also define the preferred source and target languages to translate content using the application, which will apply only while using the document translation UI. It automates the translation process by not having to define the source and target language every time the application opens. 

New: Updated tile in SAP BTP

As part of the efforts of migrating the application for software translation to the multi-cloud environment, the tile available on SAP Business Technology Platform has been renamed, from Document Translation to SAP Translation Hub. That’s one of the last steps towards completing the migration planned in Q2 2024.

Get started with SAP Translation Hub.

Generative AI Management

SAP AI Core

New: SDK for support of large language models

We introduced a series of features in SAP AI Core: 

  • Technical libraries that simplify inference on large language models (LLMs) by automatically injecting the correct headers and paths into each request. It improves the extensibility, allowing users to add additional adaptations as needed. 
  • Tooling for the effective integration and use of LLMs with LangChain in the context of the generative AI hub. It simplifies the developer experience with ready-to-use libraries for access to LLMs deployed using the generative AI hub. 
  • A new library, the ai-core-llm-sdk, in addition to enhancements to the existing ai-core-sdk, to accommodate the required changes to support LLM access. It boosts efficiency when working with various LLM models by streamlining the deployment of LLM models and the querying of available models.

Get started with SAP AI Core.

Business Data & Context 

SAP HANA Cloud

New: Support for storage and retrieval of vector embeddings in SAP HANA Cloud, called SAP HANA Cloud vector engine  

A vector datastore manages unstructured data - such as text, images, or audio - in high-dimensional vector space as vector embeddings, to provide long-term memory and better context to AI models. This makes it easy to find and retrieve similar objects quickly, for example, by asking a question using natural language. This both simplifies interactions with large language models (LLMs) and empowers developers to securely implement generative AI in applications. 

SAP HANA Cloud vector engine can now natively store and search vector embeddings, which are numerical representations of objects, along with business data as part of its industry-leading multi-model processing capabilities to power intelligent data applications.

With these vector capabilities, SAP HANA Cloud will enable Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG), facilitating the combination of LLMs with private business data. These applications learn and adapt to new information, enabling automated decision-making.

Key benefits of the SAP HANA Cloud vector engine include:

  • Multi-model: Users can unify all types of data into a single database to build innovative applications using an efficient data architecture and in-memory performance. By adding vector storage and processing to the same database already storing relational, graph, spatial, and even JSON data, application developers can create next-generation solutions that interact more naturally with the user.
  • Enhanced search and analysis: Businesses can now apply semantic and similarity search to business processes using documents like contracts, design specifications, and even service call notes.
  • Personalized recommendations: Users can benefit from an improved overall experience with more accurate and personalized suggestions.
  • Optimized large language models: The output of LLMs is augmented with more effective and contextual data.

To deep dive into the SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine, read these blog posts by our experts:

  • Vectorize your Data: SAP HANA Cloud's Vector Engine for Unified Data Excellence
  • From Developer's Desk: SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine

Build business-ready AI applications with SAP and stay updated! 

  • Leverage the AI Foundation capabilities by visiting the SAP Discovery Center. Compare and select the service that fits most to your business needs. 
  • Explore the AI Foundation roadmap to discover past and upcoming innovations. 
  • Engage with our community of SAP experts through Q&A and blog posts.

See you next quarter for exciting innovations!

entry.title: Transfer between Storage Locations and plants (A&B)
entry.content:
the goal is to transfer quality stock between 2 plant using the same inspection lot.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Transfer between Storage Locations and plants (A&B)
entry.content:
Hi,

thank you for the details provided.

The way to transfer stock between storage locations/plants is transaction QAC2 (and the corresponding fiori app) when working with inspection lot, see SAP Help:

'Stock Transfers'
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/2bc3ee8d1c83404e8cf62418640004f2/fd13c453f57eb44ce10000000a174cb4.html?locale=en-US

Also, during usage decision the stock can be posted and then you can move the stock with MM transactions.

Have a nice day,
​SAP Support
​***
​Read and follow the 'SAP Community Rules of Engagement' at
​https://www.sap.com/community/about/rules-of-engagement.html

entry.title: Re: Substitutions in SAP FI
entry.content:
Hi,

You can try to regenerate substituions by using program RGUGBR00.

Best Regards,

AI

entry.title: Re: Table control as input fields: 'LOOP' cannot be assigned to any field.
entry.content:
Hi Raymond,

thank you for your answer.

I have the definition in my program, everything is activated...

entry.title: Re: Segmentation fault (core dumped) error while applying Oracle Bundle Patch on AIX
entry.content: Was there any manual copy operation made in the $ORACLE_HOME? This can easily lead to such situation, also mentioning that manually changing any file (copy,move,etc,) is stricktly forbidden and leave the Oracle Software in an unsupported state.

entry.title: MII configuration and content transport management
entry.content:
1.    Introduction

SAP Manufacturing Integration and Intelligence is a manufacturing platform providing seamless integration from top floor to shop floor and vice versa, shop floor operational visibility and manufacturing performance management. customer/partner does quite of MII configuration and MII content development to cater to specific shop floor requirement customer has which needs to be transported across system e.g., development to quality to production system. This document will share what are the different options for transporting MII configuration and MII content across systems.  

2.     MII Configuration transport

MII has quite of configuration objects e.g. data servers, credential store etc. which needs to be transported across system for faster implementation. in MII, There are 2 ways of transporting MII configuration i.e., using export/import using Zip files and using CTS+ configuration which will be discussed further.

2.1     MII Configuration transport using zip file.

In order to transport MII configuration data using zip file, please use the following steps.

  1. In the source system, Go to MII Menu -> System Management -> Configuration -> Export tab. Choose Export Method as File System, file format as Zip, Encryption Algorithm as one of the option mentioned in the dropdown, provide a pass phrase to protect the file and select the configuration data you would like to transport to other system.

                             

           2. It will provide an option to download the file into your file system. Save the file in your machine.

           3. In the target system, Go to MII Menu -> System Management -> Configuration -> Import tab.                     Choose the encryption algorithm and pass phrase as what was provided during the export,  provide the file location and choose Import button. This will import the content from the Zip file into                 target system.

                                   

 

2.2     MII Configuration transport using CTS+.

Export/Import using the zip file could be quite cumbersome, provide no tracking and approval process hence it is possible to use CTS+ process to transport the MII configuration data across system which internally creates an ABAP transport request, attaches the content file to the transport and on release import into target system as defined in the transport route in ABAP system. This process can be integrated with solution manager also to provide transporting content from different technologies i.e., MII and ABAP. Please check the note 3452468 - How to transport MII configuration data across system using CTS+ approach for step by step details on how to configure such transport.

3     MII Content transport

Customer/Partner creates quite of development objects in MII using MII workbench i.e. Query Template, Display template, transaction. All these objects are stored in MII DB in XML format. This content needs to be transported across system for seamless implementation and also requires proper source code management since multiple people need to work on these development object and for multiple releases. MII supports multiple options for transporting MII content with and without source code management which will be discussed now.

3.1     MII Content transport using zip file.

In order to transport MII content data using zip file, please use the following steps.

  1. In the source system, Go to MII Menu -> System Management -> Projects and select a project and choose Export button.

                    

  1. It will download the project content in a zip file and store it in your machine.
  2. In the target system, Go to MII Menu -> System Management -> Projects and select import. Provide the zip file path in the pop up screen and choose Ok. This will import the project in the target system.

The transport using the zip file approach doesn’t provide any source code management for MII content and moves the whole project instead of only changed projects hence it is always recommended to use the NWDI based approach which provides central source code management, build process and deployment process.

3.2     MII Content transport using NWDI integration with CMS.

MII Content transport using NWDI approach uses SAP NetWeaver Java Development Infrastructure with following components.

  1. Design Time Repository (DTR): DTR is a central storage of design time objects (application source code) that supports distributed versioning. Access to the central storage is through the standard WebDAV and DeltaV protocols.
  2.  Component Build Service (CBS): CBS plays a central role in the realization of the concepts of the NWDI. It offers centralized build services, storage of build results and build tools.
  3.  Change Management Service (CMS): CMS offers services to configuration of the landscape, transport software changes within the landscape and also packaging and delivery of the components being developed using NWDI.  

For step-by-step details on how to do this set up, kindly check the following note 3452084 - How to setup/configure NWDI in MII for content development.

3.3     MII Content transport using NWDI integration with CM Services

CM Services is a enhanced version of CMS which provides fine granular transport of the activities. For details please check the note 1361909 - CM Services in CTS+ and following blog.

MII NWDI integration using CMS service moves the whole project across system. In case much fine granular transport is needed then use NWDI integration with CM Services. Please find the step-by-step details in following note 2862116 - CM services integration with SAP MII for build process using NWDI.

4    Conclusion

SAP MII supports detailed transport management for configuration and MII Content

based on above mentioned information. In case, you have different version of MII content

development e.g., one deployed on production on which corrections are needed for

patch delivery and another version for new development then it is recommended to use

different tracks for these scenarios. Please check the following blog for more details.

entry.title: Re: Navigation not working in BUILD app when accessed via C4C Mashup
entry.content:
Hi Yogesh,

I think you are using the HTML mashup, right?

Let's say the URL injecting to the HTML mashup is https://bing.com, you can test if issues were caused by the mashup or the URL by accessing it at http://iframe.projects.vincemitchell.me.

PFA.

entry.title: Re: Segmentation fault (core dumped) error while applying Oracle Bundle Patch on AIX
entry.content: It seems like you're encountering a segmentation fault issue when running the `catsbp.sh` script after applying an Oracle bundle patch on an AIX server. Segmentation faults can occur due to various reasons, including memory corruption, invalid memory access, or bugs in the software. Here are some steps you can take to troubleshoot and resolve the segmentation fault issue: 1. **Check Patch Compatibility**: Ensure that the bundle patch you applied is compatible with your Oracle Database version (12.2.0.1) and the operating system (AIX 7.1). Sometimes, applying incompatible patches can lead to unexpected issues. 2. **Review Oracle Documentation**: Consult the Oracle documentation and release notes for the bundle patch you applied. Look for any known issues, prerequisites, or post-patch steps that need to be followed. Oracle often provides troubleshooting guidance for common issues encountered during patching. 3. **Verify Environment Settings**: Double-check the environment settings, including `$ORACLE_HOME` and `$PATH`, to ensure they are correctly configured. Make sure that the `perl` executable being invoked by `catsbp.sh` is the one provided by Oracle in the `$ORACLE_HOME/perl/bin` directory. 4. **Check Permissions and Ownership**: Ensure that the Oracle user has appropriate permissions and ownership for all files and directories related to the Oracle installation. Improper permissions can sometimes lead to segmentation faults or other errors. 5. **Review System Logs**: Examine system logs, such as the AIX error log (`errpt`), for any additional information about the segmentation fault. Look for entries related to the `catsbp.sh` script or the `perl` process that crashed. 6. **Memory and Resource Usage**: Monitor system memory and resource usage during the execution of `catsbp.sh`. Use tools like `top`, `vmstat`, or `nmon` to check for any unusual spikes or limitations that could be causing the segmentation fault. 7. **Review Stack Size**: Since you mentioned comparing `ulimit` values, continue investigating the stack size and other resource limits. Ensure that the stack size is sufficient for the operations performed by the script. 8. **Contact Oracle Support**: If you're unable to resolve the issue through troubleshooting, consider opening a support ticket with Oracle Support. Provide them with detailed information about the error, including any relevant logs or error messages, for further assistance. By following these steps and systematically troubleshooting the issue, you should be able to identify the root cause of the segmentation fault and resolve it.

entry.title: SAC catch error from Planning Sequence
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm launching a planning sequence in SAC which throws an error if some conditions are met. The error is caught in SAC but the code after keeps running, even if the planning sequence raised the error. I need the code to stop, but do not know the instruction to use.

I need something like a try/catch statement, or a "On Error go to", to stop th code execution in SAC

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Prefilling Fields When Creating a New Entity with CAP Node.js
entry.content:
@MioYasutake 

You are right, I already tried with "InvocationGrouping: ChangeSet" but it has a veeeeery weird behaviour: if I set it via annotation, it wraps each single POST in a $batch call and sends a request for each selected row (a lot of requests, not ideal at all); if I set it via invokeAction editFlowAPI it wraps correctly all POSTs in a single $batch call but then the backend callback still processes each entity individually (i.e. it is called n times for n selected rows) and if I select a lot of rows this causes a request timeout 😞

I can't find a proper way to meet my requirements. I actually use an unbound action passing all the IDs of the selected rows (which I don't like)...  but unbound actions still don't have Side Effects (I think it's in the roadmap).

Anyway... thank you for your effort at simplifyings things in this jungle

Chiara

entry.title: Re: Streamline the updates for SAP HANA Cloud with SAP Automation Pilot
entry.content:
Hello Biser, 
great that this is now also available for Multi-Environment SAP HANA Cloud, HANA Databases.
Does this also work for SAP HANA Cloud, HANA Data Lake instances? 
If not, are there any plans to make this available for HDL as well?
Thanks and regards, 
  Alexander

entry.title: Re: SAP Developer Challenge - APIs - Task 0 - Learn to share your task results
Re: Substitutions in SAP FI
entry.content: Did you activate the include, is navigation to previously existing exits successful?

entry.title: Restriction on material type on MM01,MM02,MM03
entry.content:
Hi,
After conversion from ECC to S/4 HANA we are facing issues in restriction material type on MM01,MM02 & MM03, before conversion we are able to restrict the material type through interval (assign values in it). you can see in the snapshot in object K_ML_MTART material type were restricted in S/4 HANA but MM01,MM02,MM03 called m_mate_mar,m_mate_mat & m_mate_sta and in these object restriction field shows actives of active and inactive (01,02) instead of interval where we can enter the material types.

before the conversion in these object some material type were assigned but we are unable to edit them. we already run in su25 postprocess the setting after upgrading to a higher release. 2a, 2b,2c

entry.title: Re: Upgrade SAP B1 v10 2208 to v10 2402 still has issues...
entry.content: Hi Ankit, yes I have, so are we then advised to accept it even if we haven't modified the indexes and the upgrade will fix itself? "During the upgrade process, detected illegal changes to the database indexes will be overwritten according to the database structure template. As result, these changes will be lost."

entry.title: Re: Can we create complex transactional FIORI apps using...
entry.content: There is a concept called "Draft Handling" for UI5 that is intended to substitute stateful transaction handling. Of course this is a crutch, but it should actually solve your problem.
